violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Handle for scoop used in the ice bin was found buried in ice. Handles should be easily accessible.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touching his clothing and did not change his gloves. Gloves should be changed when touching personal items and other items not related to food service task.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. Observed food employee towel drying dishes. Dishes should be allowed to air dry.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Canned beverage found open on the counter near the prep table. Personal items should be stored separate from items used in food service.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
